description: Operator enrichment: increment_style/increment_op, compound_op, shift_direction/shift_amount, operator_category. Grounded on forgeql-pub.frozen (C/C++ enrichment fixtures provide clean increment/compound_assignment/shift_expression nodes; Rust negative).

cases.name: increment_prefix
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'tests/fixtures/enrichment_patterns.cpp' WHERE fql_kind='increment' WHERE increment_style='prefix' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 20

cases.name: increment_postfix_global
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind='increment' WHERE increment_style='postfix' LIMIT 100

cases.name: increment_op_decrement
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'tests/fixtures/enrichment_patterns.cpp' WHERE fql_kind='increment' WHERE increment_op='--' LIMIT 100

cases.name: compound_assignment_in_file
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'tests/fixtures/enrichment_patterns.cpp' WHERE compound_op != '' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 100

cases.name: shift_expression_in_file
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'tests/fixtures/enrichment_patterns.cpp' WHERE shift_direction != '' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 20

cases.name: negative_no_increment_in_rust
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='increment' LIMIT 5
